creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
This is caused by a known problem in clang 3.2. The problem has been 
solved in the clang repository branch for the upcoming 3.2 release and 
the fix will be imported in FreeBSD with it.

For reference:

http://llvm.org/bugs/show_bug.cgi?id=14491

http://llvm.org/viewvc/llvm-project?view=rev&revision=169451

I discovered this while trying to fix clucene mysqlf.

If you agree I'll close this PR.

-- 
Guido Falsi <madpilot@FreeBSD.org>
